title: Deep-Yagya in Belgium
content: AWGP- EUROPE Cordially invites you all to Deep-Yagya Ceremony in the divine presence of Aadarniya Chinmay Bhai Sahab 🙏💐

title: Bal Sanskar Shala
content:
- 2 hrs Sunday morning classes for children aged between 6 to 13 yrs for Cultural & Values Development.
- Awareness about spiritual glory of Indian Culture & inculcate divine qualities through that.
- Improving physical, mental and spiritual wellbeing of future generation.
- Learning human/moral values, ethics, spiritual practices through games and stories.
- 5 Days Training provided in Shantikunj - along with on-demand training camps across the globe.
- More than 20,000 classes & regular vacation camps running across the globe.
